title: ME? THE MENTOR?!
overview: Socially awkward Kannawa is tasked to mentor the newbie, Kamegawa. Can she pull off being the cool senpai?

title: I Wanna Invite My Junior to Lunch!
overview: Kannawa tackles a new challenge: Inviting her junior to lunch!

title: I Gotta Support the Drinking Party's Organizer!
overview: Kannawa needs to help her junior plan an office drinking party.

title: The Really Hot Okinawa Business Trip!
overview: Kannawa and Kamegawa goes on a business trip to Okinawa. What could go wrong?

title: It's All the Typhoon's Fault!
overview: Kannawa needs to show Kamegawa that she is prepared to work even during a rainy typhoon!

title: A Yukata Is the Norm for Fireworks Festivals
overview: Kannawa struggles to ask Kamegawa out for drinks, but is instead invited to go to a festival with the newbies!

title: Mom's Comin' to Visit!
overview: Kannawa's mom makes a surprise visit, and she needs to fool her into thinking she has a boyfriend!

title: I'm Gonna Be a Maid!
overview: The grand opening for Kamegawa's first project, a collab maid cafe, begins!

title: Then Why Can't I Stop Thinkin' 'Bout It?
overview: Kankaiji, Kannawa's long time cohort, joins the group for a spa day! But could they be more than cohorts?

title: I'm Gonna Visit My Junior!
overview: Kamegawa is sick! As his senpai, Kannawa decides to check on him. But who's this mystery girl at his house?

title: We're Gonna Celebrate Yer Birthday to the Fullest!
overview: Kannawa wants to celebrate Kamegawa's birthday with extra care.

title: I Really Thought About It, Ya Know?!
overview: Kannawa and Kamegawa want to be more than just friends. But can they overcome Kannawa's awkwardness?
